overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through wet London streets at night. The character passes a police van, a roadside memorial with candles, and crosses an intersection while the jacket glows red indicating detection. The environment features historic brick buildings, autumn foliage, and reflective wet pavement under street lamps.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing a parked police van on the left. Historic brick buildings line the street while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. Street lamps cast warm light on the reflective pavement.

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a roadside memorial adorned with candles and flowers against an iron fence. Autumn trees with vibrant orange leaves line the sidewalk. The police van is left behind as the character continues through the residential area.

segments.scene_description: The character approaches an intersection and crosses the street at the crosswalk. The jacket glows red indicating a detection state. A white sedan waits at the crosswalk while modern buildings and traffic lights frame the background. The memorial and iron fence recede as the character enters the open intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet city neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential street into a busy urban intersection. It begins by tracking a character along a reflective sidewalk past a parked police van and historic brick buildings illuminated by warm street lamps. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts toward a roadside memorial of candles and flowers set against an iron fence, flanked by autumn trees with vibrant orange leaves. The camera then follows the character as they leave the residential area behind and enter an open intersection, where the jacket glows red to indicate detection. Finally, the view expands across the crosswalk past a waiting white sedan, with modern buildings and traffic lights framing the background.
